name: Mendenhall Sourdough Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the brown sugar and shortening together until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg, then add molasses, mixing continuously.
3. Sift dry ingredients (baking soda, flour, ginger, cinnamon) into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually blend the sifted dry ingredients with hot water.
5. Carefully beat this mixture into the creamed mixture.
6. Slowly incorporate the sourdough starter, stirring gently to keep the batter bubbly.
7. Pour the batter into a greased pan and bake at 375°F for about 30 minutes or until set.
8. Serve with ice cream or whipped cream while still hot if possible.
